channel.title: P2p on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in P2p on Pi Stack

item.title: PairDrop vs Snapdrop vs FilePizza: Best Self-Hosted Browser File Sharing 2026
item.description: Transferring files between devices used to mean uploading to a cloud service, sharing a link, and hoping the recipient downloads before the link expires. Browser-based file sharing tools eliminate that friction entirely — open your browser, find the recipient on the same network, and send files directly peer-to-peer.
